channel.title: Triply Blog
channel.description: Travel planning tips, bucket list guides, and how AI is changing the way we explore the world.

item.title: Triply vs Roamy: Which App Is Better for Saving Travel Spots?
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: Both apps extract places from Reels. Roamy does more — itineraries, route optimization, TikTok. Triply does less, but simpler. Here is how they compare.

item.title: Triply vs Wanderlog: Which Travel App Actually Saves You Time?
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: Wanderlog is great for itinerary planning, but Triply starts where you actually discover places — Instagram Reels. Here's how they compare.

item.title: Triply vs Instagram Saved Collections: Why Saving Reels Isn't Enough
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: Instagram saves are just bookmarks — no place names, no map, no organization. Triply actually extracts the places from your saved Reels.

item.title: Triply vs Notion for Travel Planning: Which Should You Use?
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: Notion is infinitely flexible but requires manual work. Triply automates the capture step. They actually work well together.

item.title: Triply vs Google Maps Saved Places: The Better Travel Bucket List
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: Google Maps lists work but are designed for navigation, not discovery. No way to import from Reels, limited organization.

item.title: How to Save Places from Instagram Reels (5 Methods Compared)
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: You just watched an amazing travel Reel — a hidden waterfall in Bali, a rooftop bar in Bangkok. Now what? Here are 5 ways to save those places, compared.

item.title: The Best Travel Bucket List App in 2026 — And Why It Starts with Reels
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: Most bucket list apps make you type places manually. But in 2026, travel inspiration comes from Reels. Here's the best travel bucket list app that actually keeps up.

item.title: 7 Best Apps to Save Travel Places from Instagram and TikTok (2026)
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: The best apps for saving travel places you discover on Instagram Reels and TikTok — from AI-powered extractors to manual pinning tools.

item.title: I Saved 200+ Travel Reels and Went Nowhere — Here's What I Do Now
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: I had 200+ saved travel Reels and visited zero of those places. Here's the system I built to actually turn saved Reels into real trips.

item.title: Triply vs Google Maps: Which Is Better for Travel Bucket Lists?
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: Google Maps is great for navigation, but is it the best tool for building a travel bucket list? We compare it to Triply across the features that matter.

item.title: How AI Is Changing Travel Planning in 2026
item.dc:creator: Aucto AI
item.description: From extracting places from Reels to generating full itineraries, AI is fundamentally changing how we plan travel in 2026.
